text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The racecourse is bustling as the spring Tenno
Sho approaches, and all eyes are on one racer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... I need to be able to maintain my top speed for longer...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
McQueen is incredible. She's already way past
fast enough.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I can't believe she still wants to be faster... She's definitely going to win this year's spring Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Sigh... There goes all my confidence.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Eep! Wh-what is it?!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Y-yeah. I... I can't just give up.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...I'm facing off against my rival, after all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: At night...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Knock, knock.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: E-excuse me... M-my name is Zenno Rob Roy...
choice_data_list: Oh, you're the one always cheering Rice on!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Th-that's right! Speaking of Rice...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Have you seen her?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
She hasn't come back to our room yet. It's already
well past roll call...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... huff...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh? Big Brother... and Rob Roy?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh? Big Sister... and Rob Roy?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I-I'm sorry, but...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...I'm sorry. I'll get some rest.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
U-um... Rice? This is the "Big Brother" you always
tell me about, correct?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
U-um... Rice? This is the "Big Sister" you always
tell me about, correct?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
The one who's super nice? Didn't you say that
your meeting felt fated, like something out of a
fairy tale?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Gyahhh! Rob Roy! Hush! Shhh!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: N-no, I won't hush. I'm trying to help you!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Rob Roy...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
The blue rose you love so much did not bloom by
itself.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
If you're struggling... I think you ought to ask for
help.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Hic... B-but... I'm so scared!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Wh-what if the people I ask for help find out?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
What if they figure out that I'll never amount to
anything?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I don't want to make anyone unhappy... I don't
want to be a disappointment!
choice_data_list: I would never think that about you.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: E-exactly! And neither would I!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure everyone who supports you feels the
same way!
choice_data_list: Please... don't try to do this all by yourself.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: B-Big Brother! Sob... sniffle...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: B-Big Sister! Sob... sniffle...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Waaaaah! McQueen is just so, so fast!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: B-but I... I want to be even faster!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Waaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Tears begin to gush down Rice Shower's cheeks.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The next day...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: C-come on, Rice, you can do it!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Urgh... A-are you sure this is okay?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Y-yes, definitely! You cheer her on too, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: O-okay!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...If you have nothing to discuss with me, I shall
now resume my previous directive.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Eep! W-wait, Bourbon... I... Um...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I need your help!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Is there a glitch in your communication
faculties?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
N-no, I'm fine! I just have something I want to ask
you!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I know that this might upset you, but... you have
to help me!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I'm not good enough as I am right now. I don't
stand a chance of keeping up with McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
So please teach me how to run! Everything that I
don't know!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
choice_data_list: Create the miracle you want to see with us.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...Understood.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I have deemed this a necessary step towards
creating the conditions for the ultimate race.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I accept your request and will adjust my schedule.
To begin, you are approved for ten sets of ramp
training with me this afternoon.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Objective: to improve muscle performance and
speed. Should additional weight become
necessary, I will supply special ankle weights.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
But exercise caution... Some have referred to my
training as "demonic."

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Can you keep up?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...Yes!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, the two run off. Time to get ready for
the spring Tenno Sho!
